summary: Phase 31 City-Scale Safety Heatmap Engine fully tested. Backend: 18/18 tests passed verifying city-heatmap, city-heatmap/stats, city-heatmap/cell/{grid_id} endpoints with composite score formula validation (0.30*forecast + 0.25*hotspot + 0.20*trend + 0.15*activity + 0.10*patrol), risk level classification, and 404 for nonexistent cells. Frontend: All heatmap dashboard features verified - Leaflet map with dark CartoDB tiles centered on Bangalore, 6 signal toggles (Composite, Forecast, Hotspot, Trend, Activity, Patrol), stats panel with Critical/High/Moderate/Safe counts, grid info panel, intensity legend, cell detail panel with signal breakdown bars and recommendations.
critical_code_review_comments: Composite score calculation correctly implements weighted sum: 0.30*forecast + 0.25*hotspot + 0.20*trend + 0.15*activity + 0.10*patrol
Risk level classification thresholds correctly applied: critical >= 7.0, high >= 5.0, moderate >= 3.0, safe < 3.0
Grid cells correctly generated at 250m x 250m resolution with grid_id format C{row:03d}_{col:03d}
Cell detail API returns all 5 signals with name, score, weight, weighted values plus dominant_signal and recommendations
Stats endpoint provides lightweight summary (total_zones, critical_zones, high_risk_zones, recent_incidents_7d) for Command Center widget
Frontend signal toggles correctly switch active signal and re-render heat layer
Cell detail popup shows signal breakdown bars with color coding based on intensity
MapClickHandler correctly identifies nearest cell within 0.003 degree radius on click
HeatLayer uses leaflet.heat with gradient from green (safe) to dark red (critical)
seed_data_creation: Used existing location_risk_zones (learned_hotspots) and location_incidents data for heatmap generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 31 adds city-scale safety heatmap aggregating 5 AI signal layers. Key endpoints: GET /api/operator/city-heatmap (full grid with cells, stats, bounds, weights), GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/stats (lightweight summary), GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/cell/{grid_id} (detailed breakdown). Frontend CityHeatmapDashboard at /operator/city-heatmap. Grid generates 434 active cells from ~624 total. Stats show Critical: 6, High: 43, Moderate: 93, Safe: 292. Dominant signal: Activity. Test file: test_city_heatmap.py

backend_api_tests: Cells contain grid_id, lat, lng, composite_score, risk_level, hotspot, trend, forecast, activity, patrol
Stats contains critical, high, moderate, safe counts + dominant_signal + forecast_p1_cells
Bounds contains min_lat, max_lat, min_lng, max_lng for map centering
Weights verified: forecast=0.30, hotspot=0.25, trend=0.20, activity=0.15, patrol=0.10
Composite score calculation verified (weighted sum formula)
Risk level classification verified (critical >= 7.0, high >= 5.0, moderate >= 3.0, safe < 3.0)
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/stats - returns total_zones, critical_zones, high_risk_zones, recent_incidents_7d
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/cell/{grid_id} - returns detailed breakdown with signals array
Cell detail signals contain name, score, weight, weighted values
Cell detail includes dominant_signal and recommendations array
All endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
frontend_ui_tests: City Heatmap nav link visible in sidebar with Globe icon
Dashboard auto-loads heatmap data on mount
Stats panel shows Critical (6), High Risk (43), Moderate (93), Safe (292)
Stats panel shows Dominant Signal: Activity
Stats panel shows Forecast P1 Cells: 607, Active Cells: 434
Grid Info panel shows Cell Size: 250m, Zones: 18, Incidents (30d): 80
All 6 signal toggles present: Composite, Forecast, Hotspot, Trend, Activity, Patrol
Signal toggle click switches active signal and re-renders heat layer
Map renders with dark CartoDB tiles centered on Bangalore
Cell detail panel appears on map click
Cell detail shows Grid Cell ID, coordinates, composite score
Cell detail shows Signal Breakdown with all 5 signals and scores
Cell detail shows Dominant signal indicator
Cell detail shows Recommendations (e.g., 'Standard monitoring recommended')

verified_features: GET /api/operator/city-heatmap returns cells array with grid_id, lat, lng, composite_score, risk_level, 5 signal scores
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap returns stats with critical/high/moderate/safe counts, dominant_signal, forecast_p1_cells
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap returns bounds for map auto-centering
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap returns weights object confirming formula
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/stats returns lightweight summary for Command Center widget
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/cell/{grid_id} returns detailed cell breakdown with signals array
Risk level thresholds: critical >= 7.0, high >= 5.0, moderate >= 3.0, safe < 3.0
Sidebar nav shows 'City Heatmap' with Globe icon
Signal toggles switch heat layer visualization
Stats panel shows Critical/High Risk/Moderate/Safe counts
Grid info panel shows cell size (250m), zones, incidents
Intensity legend shows Safe-to-Critical color gradient
Map renders with dark CartoDB tiles (https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/)
Cell detail popup shows signal breakdown bars and recommendations
